name: Earnings Reveal
description: Professional quarterly earnings card showing EPS, Revenue, and Guidance

fields.QUARTER_LABEL: Period or event label, e.g. Q3 2023 EARNINGS or M&S MARKET WIPEOUT
fields.EPS_ACTUAL: Primary financial figure from the script, e.g. -£1B or $1.42
fields.EPS_ESTIMATE: Secondary or comparison figure, e.g. ESTIMATE or $1.35
fields.REVENUE_BEAT: Revenue or impact figure with direction, e.g. -£1B ERASED or +$450M BEAT
fields.GUIDANCE_TEXT: One-line summary of the financial outcome described in the script
